value.found_quote: Auto memory: Notes Claude writes for itself based on your corrections and preferences, stored per git repository under `~/.claude/projects/`. All worktrees of the same repository share one auto memory directory. The first 200 lines or 25 KB of the `MEMORY.md` index loads at the start of every session.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes Auto memory as MEMORY.md notes Claude writes for itself based on corrections/preferences, persisted per git repository and auto-loaded at the start of every session, matching the claim. No deprecation or preview status is indicated.
